message:
test(e2e): enhance E2E testing framework and test coverage

Improve E2E testing infrastructure:
- lib/: Reporter and fixture improvements
- logging-demo.spec.ts: Demo test updates
- safety-posture.spec.ts: Safety posture testing
- setup.spec.ts: Extended setup verification
- snapshot.spec.ts: Snapshot test improvements
- contract/: API schema contract tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
